evals.prompt: Build a quote wizard for a plumbing company called Rapid Flow Plumbing. Services: Emergency call-out, Boiler service & repair, Bathroom installation, Leaking tap or pipe, Blocked drains. Brand colours: #003366 (primary), #ff6600 (accent). Contact: email via Formspree, formspree_id is xkzgbpqw.
evals.expected_output: A self-contained HTML section block with a 5-step quote wizard. Step 1 shows service cards for all 5 services plus an 'Other' option. Step 2 includes trade-specific plumber follow-up questions (repair vs install, area affected, urgency). Step 3 allows up to 4 photo uploads. Step 4 collects name/phone/email/postcode. Step 5 is a confirmation screen. The form posts to https://formspree.io/f/xkzgbpqw. Brand colours #003366 and #ff6600 are applied throughout. Zero external dependencies.

assertions.name: includes_all_services
assertions.description: All 5 services appear as selectable options, plus an Other option

assertions.name: photo_upload_max_4
assertions.description: Photo input limits to 4 files (multiple attribute + JS validation)

assertions.name: plumber_followup_questions
assertions.description: Step 2 includes plumber-specific questions (repair vs install, area, urgency)

assertions.name: five_steps_present
assertions.description: 5 distinct wizard steps are present in the HTML

assertions.name: brand_colours_applied
assertions.description: Both #003366 and #ff6600 appear in the CSS

assertions.name: no_external_dependencies
assertions.description: No CDN links or external script/style imports in the output

assertions.name: mobile_responsive
assertions.description: CSS includes media queries or responsive layout for small screens

evals.prompt: Create a quote request form for Green Garden Landscaping. Services they offer: Garden design & consultation, Lawn care & maintenance, Decking & patio installation, Tree surgery, Hedge trimming & shaping. Route to WhatsApp number +447891234567. Brand colours: #2d5a1b (primary), #f4a623 (accent).
evals.expected_output: A self-contained HTML section quote wizard for a landscaping business. WhatsApp routing: on submit, opens wa.me/447891234567 with a pre-filled URL-encoded message including selected services, description, and contact details. Note shown to user about sending photos via WhatsApp. Landscaper-specific follow-up questions in Step 2 (area size, existing hard landscaping). Brand colours #2d5a1b and #f4a623 applied.

assertions.name: whatsapp_routing
assertions.description: Submit opens a wa.me/447891234567 URL (not a form POST)

assertions.name: whatsapp_message_prefilled
assertions.description: The wa.me URL includes a pre-filled text parameter with service/contact info

assertions.name: photo_note_shown
assertions.description: User is told they can send photos in the WhatsApp conversation

assertions.name: landscaper_followup_questions
assertions.description: Step 2 includes landscaper-specific questions (area size, existing landscaping)

assertions.name: all_services_present
assertions.description: All 5 landscaping services appear plus an Other option

assertions.name: brand_colours_applied
assertions.description: Both #2d5a1b and #f4a623 appear in the CSS

evals.prompt: Build a quote wizard for Glow Beauty Studio. They offer: Haircut & blow-dry, Colour & highlights, Hair extensions, Lash extensions, Brow shaping & tinting. Brand colours: #1a0a2e (primary), #c9a96e (accent). Route to HubSpot, form ID 123456789, portal ID 987654.
evals.expected_output: A self-contained HTML section quote wizard for a beauty business. HubSpot embedded form JS API used for submission routing. Beauty-specific follow-up questions in Step 2 (first appointment, allergies/sensitivities). Photo upload still available (beauty clients may want to share inspiration images). Brand colours #1a0a2e and #c9a96e applied throughout.

assertions.name: hubspot_routing
assertions.description: HubSpot JS embed or API call used, not a standard form POST

assertions.name: beauty_followup_questions
assertions.description: Step 2 includes beauty-specific questions (first appointment, allergies)

assertions.name: all_services_present
assertions.description: All 5 beauty services appear plus an Other option

assertions.name: brand_colours_applied
assertions.description: Both #1a0a2e and #c9a96e appear in the CSS

assertions.name: photo_upload_present
assertions.description: Photo upload step is present (inspiration photos are relevant for beauty)
